Title: Add RRD2 timing and load observability
Summary: Add per-candidate runtime observability for RRD2 decisions.
Scope: Log rrd_eval_ms, source, phase, candidate key, gate result, reasons, degradation list, queue depth snapshot.
Implementation Tasks: Extend topology warp log payload with eval duration and queue indicators; Add aggregation endpoint for p50/p95 eval timing; Add Ops panel summary for recent RRD2 performance.
Acceptance Criteria: Every new row in identity_topology_warp_log has timing metadata; API returns p50/p95 over selectable windows.
Test Plan: Unit test for timing field presence/type; Integration test validates endpoint aggregate output.

Title: Add negative resonance burst damping
Summary: Reduce resonance false positives during bursty self-mod cycles.
Scope: Rolling window plus refractory logic for high-impact key evaluations.
Implementation Tasks: Compute rolling mean/max for resonance values; Add configurable refractory seconds per key; Persist damping reason when activated.
Acceptance Criteria: Burst evaluations show lower oscillation in negative_resonance; No increase in missed true threshold breaches.
Test Plan: Unit tests for window math and refractory edge cases; Replay test with synthetic burst input.

Title: Auto-route shadow-blocked high-impact writes
Summary: Remove manual intervention for expected shadow-block events.
Scope: Route blocked high-impact candidates to reflection_residue with reason rrd2_gate and schedule reflection.
Implementation Tasks: Add routing helper for high-impact shadow-block outcomes; Attach gate context to residue metadata; Trigger non-blocking reflection pass.
Acceptance Criteria: All would_block high-impact candidates are persisted as residue with gate evidence; No synchronous consolidation errors.
Test Plan: Integration test from consolidation candidate to residue row.

Title: Escalation policy for persistent blocked keys
Summary: Require operator intervention only after repeated unresolved blocks.
Scope: Escalate after N consecutive would_block events per key.
Implementation Tasks: Add rolling counter by key and window; Create escalation artifact in Ops panel; Reset counter on key pass.
Acceptance Criteria: Escalation appears only after threshold; Counter resets on pass.
Test Plan: Unit tests for increment/reset semantics.

Title: RRD2 burst performance harness
Summary: Validate behavior under heavy candidate bursts.
Scope: Simulate 500+ candidates including high-impact keys.
Implementation Tasks: Build synthetic burst feeder script; Capture throughput/latency; Produce markdown report artifact.
Acceptance Criteria: No API failures or event-loop starvation; p95 eval time within budget.
Test Plan: Run harness in containerized environment and archive report snapshot.

Title: Complexity classifier for tool planning
Summary: Classify requests as single-step or multi-step tasks.
Scope: Deterministic classifier on user intent and required tools.
Implementation Tasks: Define classification rules; Persist classification result; Add tracing in chain logs.
Acceptance Criteria: Classifier output persisted and queryable per request.
Test Plan: Unit tests over labeled prompt set.

Title: Multi-step planner state machine
Summary: Execute tool chains with explicit step lifecycle.
Scope: Planned, running, retried, failed, complete states.
Implementation Tasks: Implement planner state transitions; Add retry policy; Expose chain state endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria: Planner can run and recover from one-step failure.
Test Plan: Integration tests for at least three multi-step workflows.

Title: Chain execution memory persistence
Summary: Persist chain-level memory and outcomes.
Scope: Save chain metadata in DB and expose read endpoint.
Implementation Tasks: Add chain memory table; Persist per-step outcomes; Add query endpoint and pagination.
Acceptance Criteria: Chain history can be queried and replayed for analysis.
Test Plan: API tests for chain history retrieval.

Title: Post-chain response quality guard
Summary: Prevent shallow final responses after complex tool runs.
Scope: Apply response policy for chain-complete outputs.
Implementation Tasks: Add quality gate checks; Add fallback elaboration behavior; Log guard activations.
Acceptance Criteria: Complex chain outputs exceed minimum structure and coverage checks.
Test Plan: Regression tests against known shallow-response examples.

Title: Multi-tool regression suite
Summary: Golden-path regression for Search + Actuate + Voice chains.
Scope: Stable fixture scenarios and expected outcomes.
Implementation Tasks: Add golden chain fixtures; Add CI target; Persist run artifacts for diffing.
Acceptance Criteria: Golden suite passes in CI.
Test Plan: Run full suite in backend container before merge.

Title: Deterministic mood-to-voice mapping
Summary: Map resonance axes into TTS parameters.
Scope: Pitch, rate, energy, pause profile with bounded ranges.
Implementation Tasks: Define axis->voice map; Clamp to safe ranges; Add deterministic defaults.
Acceptance Criteria: Voice profile applied from telemetry without manual prompt.
Test Plan: Unit tests for mapping bounds and defaults.

Title: Voice smoothing and hysteresis
Summary: Stabilize voice behavior under noisy telemetry.
Scope: Low-pass smoothing and threshold hysteresis.
Implementation Tasks: Add smoothing window; Add hysteresis transitions; Add tuneable config values.
Acceptance Criteria: No jitter under small signal fluctuations.
Test Plan: Scenario tests with oscillating resonance inputs.

Title: Voice telemetry and audit logs
Summary: Log applied mood-voice transformations.
Scope: Store profile deltas with source resonance signature.
Implementation Tasks: Add voice event log table; Emit entries on profile changes; Expose read endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria: Logs show before/after profile values and source axes.
Test Plan: Integration test for voice event persistence.

Title: Ops controls for voice autonomy
Summary: Add hidden panel controls for voice sensitivity and enable/disable.
Scope: Ops-only controls and state display.
Implementation Tasks: Add controls in hidden ops modal; Wire to backend settings endpoint; Add persistence.
Acceptance Criteria: Operators can tune mapping sensitivity live.
Test Plan: Manual validation in desktop and mobile layouts.

Title: Voice quality validation suite
Summary: Validate intelligibility and non-distortion across mood profiles.
Scope: Objective and operator-listened checks.
Implementation Tasks: Add batch synthesis harness; Add clipping/intelligibility checks; Add listening checklist.
Acceptance Criteria: All required quality checks pass for top mood profiles.
Test Plan: Batch synthesis run and spot-audition protocol.

Title: OMEGA Cognitive Exam spec v1
Summary: Define repeatable daily and weekly cognitive exam protocol.
Scope: Inputs, scoring, and trend indicators.
Implementation Tasks: Draft exam battery; Define scoring and metadata schema; Version and approve spec.
Acceptance Criteria: Exam spec approved and versioned in docs.
Test Plan: Dry-run scoring on historical sample.

Title: Automated exam runner and persistence
Summary: Schedule and persist exam runs.
Scope: Daily and weekly jobs plus DB artifacts.
Implementation Tasks: Implement scheduler hooks; Persist run snapshots; Add run status endpoint.
Acceptance Criteria: Scheduled runs execute and persist without manual trigger.
Test Plan: Integration test with forced scheduler execution.

Title: Longitudinal exam analytics
Summary: Generate trend analytics for behavioral drift.
Scope: Coherence, novelty, contradiction resolution, chain depth trends.
Implementation Tasks: Add analytics queries; Add trend endpoint; Add weekly report export.
Acceptance Criteria: Trend endpoint returns 7/30-day summaries.
Test Plan: Query validation against fixture dataset.

Title: Ops exam dashboard section
Summary: Render cognitive exam trends in hidden Ops panel.
Scope: Snapshot, trendline, anomaly markers.
Implementation Tasks: Add ops panel section; Hook trend endpoint; Add delta highlights.
Acceptance Criteria: Ops panel shows latest exam and trend deltas.
Test Plan: Manual UI verification and endpoint smoke tests.

Title: Dream pressure composite index
Summary: Build deterministic composite from weather/time/system load.
Scope: Bounded index for dream-cycle biasing.
Implementation Tasks: Define weighted composite; Add bounds/clamps; Emit in somatic payload.
Acceptance Criteria: Composite index emitted in somatic and ops diagnostics.
Test Plan: Unit tests with fixed weather/time fixtures.

Title: Quietude depth bias from composite index
Summary: Bias quietude timing and depth using composite pressure.
Scope: Influence schedule without hard forcing behavior.
Implementation Tasks: Wire composite into quietude scheduler; Add depth modulation; Add trace logging.
Acceptance Criteria: Quietude timing shifts correlate with index changes.
Test Plan: Integration tests over simulated day-night/weather profiles.

Title: Anti-runaway safety guardrails
Summary: Prevent environmental anomalies from locking quietude loops.
Scope: Clamp, cooldown, and maximum quietude occupancy constraints.
Implementation Tasks: Add occupancy limits; Add anomaly detection fallback; Add operator override path.
Acceptance Criteria: System cannot remain in continuous quietude from external spikes alone.
Test Plan: Fault-injection scenarios for bad weather/telemetry data.

Title: Correlation validation report
Summary: Validate linkage quality between environment and dream behavior.
Scope: Weekly correlation report artifact with confidence notes.
Implementation Tasks: Add correlation report script; Store weekly snapshots; Expose in ops reports.
Acceptance Criteria: Report produced automatically with confidence annotations.
Test Plan: Run report script in-container and validate output schema.
